title: trifolium stellatum subsp. incarnatum
intro: Trifolium stellatum subsp. incarnatum, also known as Crimson Clover, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the Trifolium genus. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of isoflavones and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crimson Clover include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
